chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1182 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 08.08.2023 Mr. Abdul Hameed Bajwa advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- This petition for the demarcation of a land is pending since 2016 and nothing has been done as yet. Learned AAG concedes that such applications have been pending but the petitioner himself is not pursuing his applications. In such a situation, it appears that the official authority may decide the applications as required under the law even in case if the petitioner fails to appear before it as agreed by counsel. The petition is disposed of in view of the above. JUDGE JUDGE
